name: Danby Fishing Access (Otter Creek)
notes: VTF&W access at the foot of the Danby-Mt. Tabor trophy reach.

name: Route 2 bridge east of Waterbury (Winooski River)
notes: Upper boundary of the Waterbury-Duxbury trophy section.

name: Fairfax Falls Dam (Lamoille River)
notes: Top of the Fairfax trophy trout section.

name: Former Vermont Tissue Plant Dam (Walloomsac River, Bennington)
notes: Upper end of the Walloomsac trophy section, downstream of Murphy Rd.

name: Otter Creek Wildlife Management Area (Danby)
notes: Coldwater fishery with brook, brown and rainbow trout.
